ValidationRule.description: WTP cannot be put into service without a Product.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( !$User.BypassValidationRules__c, RecordType.DeveloperName = "Client_delivery_request",
ISPICKVAL(Status,'In Service'), ISPICKVAL( Data_Solutions_Type__c , 'Recurring Report Request'), ISCHANGED(Status), OR(Total_Products__c = 0))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: WTP cannot be put into service without a Product.
